subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — it was great meeting you at the conference, and we’d be glad to continue the conversation.

We can schedule a 30-minute call next week. Here are some time windows that work on our side:

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know your preferred slot within these windows, and we’ll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I’m afraid I’m not able to share internal phone numbers or personal contact details. For senior-level engagement, please use the contact channels listed on our public website, and we will ensure the appropriate stakeholders are involved.

Best regards,
Agent
